title: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy coverage
description: Per-namespace Kubernetes NetworkPolicy segmentation posture captured read-only from the Kubernetes API (get/list on networking.k8s.io/v1 networkpolicies + core namespaces, plus the installed CNI's own policy CRDs when present — Cilium cilium.io CiliumNetworkPolicy/CiliumClusterwideNetworkPolicy, Calico crd.projectcalico.org NetworkPolicy/GlobalNetworkPolicy): how many policies exist in the namespace, a per-policy SPEC summary (name, the SOURCE API group it was read from, the directions it governs, whether its pod/endpoint selector is empty i.e. selects every pod, and a COUNT of its ingress/egress rule blocks), and the derived default-deny assessment per direction. The minimum that demonstrates the network-segmentation control (e.g. which namespaces enforce a default-deny vs are unprotected). Policy SPEC metadata ONLY — never pod contents, container env, Secret / ConfigMap values, the peer/CIDR/port/selector contents inside a rule block, nor actual traffic. The connector reads policy objects + the namespace list (read-only) and never reads pod logs, exec, or secrets. The connector emits a descriptive PASS/FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict per namespace; the platform evaluator owns the final policy call. x-default-scf-anchors are default mapping hints flagged for maintainer recheck (OQ #9).

namespace.description: Namespace the coverage assessment is for.

policy_count.description: Number of NetworkPolicy objects in the namespace (0 means fully unprotected — allow-all default).

default_deny_ingress.description: True when at least one all-pods (empty-podSelector) Ingress policy has zero ingress allow rules — the canonical default-deny-ingress posture.

default_deny_egress.description: True when at least one all-pods (empty-podSelector) Egress policy has zero egress allow rules — the canonical default-deny-egress posture.

sources.description: Optional (slice 622). The deduplicated set of policy SOURCE API groups that contributed coverage for this namespace — 'networking.k8s.io' (upstream NetworkPolicy), 'cilium.io' (Cilium CRD), and/or 'crd.projectcalico.org' (Calico CRD). Absent on records predating CNI-native support; an absent value implies upstream networking.k8s.io only.

policies.description: Per-policy SPEC summaries for the namespace. SPEC metadata only — never the peer / CIDR / port contents of a rule block.

source.description: Optional (slice 622). The API group this policy was read from. Absent implies upstream 'networking.k8s.io'. 'cilium.io' / 'crd.projectcalico.org' mark a CNI-native policy CRD folded into the assessment.

selects_all_pods.description: True when spec.podSelector is empty ({}), i.e. the policy applies to every pod in the namespace.

ingress_rule_count.description: Number of ingress rule blocks (allow rules). Zero on an all-pods Ingress policy is default-deny ingress.

egress_rule_count.description: Number of egress rule blocks (allow rules). Zero on an all-pods Egress policy is default-deny egress.
